TimeEntry.Title: Problem in Computers - Mary Ann
TimeEntry.Notes: Called Mary and she was currently busy. She called back after sometime. As per her, she is not able to connect to internet on 2 machines. Guided her to create remote session on machine connected to

TimeEntry.Title: Problem in Computers - Mary Ann
TimeEntry.Notes: Added Technjian tools in LAGROSA, needed to check if showing in portals. I will handover to next shift to install on pending machines.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Hello - Please migrate data from WKRSPM01 to new laptop
TimeEntry.Notes: Download and install the CrowdStrike on the new laptop Also start copy of user data from the  old Workstation to New laptop ,Copying of data is still in process.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Hello - Please migrate data from WKRSPM01 to new laptop
TimeEntry.Notes:
Data copy started

123 Gb Data pending

TimeEntry.Title: LAPTOP_WKRSPM01: MyRMM
TimeEntry.Notes:
Connect LAPTOP_WKRSPM01 and check MyRMM Endpoint Client not installed on the machine

Check on the portal and create RSPMD Remote Office for RSPMD

1. Performed task to create Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Hello - Please migrate data from WKRSPM01 to new laptop
TimeEntry.Notes:
Request - New laptop setup has been completed

1. Data transferred from old computer to new laptop

2. Technijian below tools has been installed

a. MyRemote

b. MyRMM

c.

TimeEntry.Title: Shared folder access issue
TimeEntry.Notes:
hared folder not accessible from one computer to another


performed below task find root cause and resolved issue

TimeEntry.Title: RSPMD: LAPTOP_WKRSPM01 Services issue for Quickbooks
TimeEntry.Notes:
Services not running for Quickbooks

troubleshoot issue and and found remote services selected default

change local as default and check it looks seems good

now issue has bee resoi

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version (11.4.2516.26.W) updated:- WKRSPMD04,LAPTOP_WKRSPM01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the portal, Found New Agent Version (11.4.2516.26.W) was released, and Pushed the sensor from the portal but it failed so connected to the below machine(WKRSPMD04
TimeEntry.Resource: A. Kumar Poddar CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Accessing the QuickBooks (QB) company file database for RSPMD
TimeEntry.Notes: Assisted the user with accessing the QuickBooks (QB) company file database for RSPMD. The issue occurred because the application was configured to share the company file from another computer, and the account was set to an online account, which prevented proper access. The configuration was updated by switching the account to a local account, re-sharing the QB company file, and ensuring appropriate access permissions. After the changes, the file was successfully accessed from multiple systems, and the QuickBooks application ran without any further issues.

TimeEntry.Title: LAPTOP_WKRSPM01 : Myremote version not update, updated it with latest version.
TimeEntry.Notes: LAPTOP_WKRSPM01 : Myremote old version found, updated it with latest version.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: WKRSPMD04 : Cisco umbrella updated with latest version
TimeEntry.Notes: WKRSPMD04 -Cisco umbrella updated with latest Cisco Secure Client Version: 5.1.12.146 successfully.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Removed more then 30days offline WKRSPMD02 computer form technijian portals
TimeEntry.Notes: Login to the portal, check to confirm that the computer has been offline for more than 30 days, as indicated in the provided screenshot. Remove the computer from the portal to ensure that it does not impact the monthly count
